mapper.insert:
select CON_SEQ.nextval from dual
insert into CONSIGNMENT values (#{conNo}, #{conAuthor}, #{conProduct}, #{conWidth}, #{conHeight}, #{conYear}, #{conHope}, #{conEtc}, default, default, sysdate, #{memId}, default)

insert all
into attachment values(ATT_NEW, #{item.attRename}, default, #{item.attFno}, #{item.attCategory}, #{item.attBno})
select * from dual
mapper.select: select * from consignment where CON_DEL_STATUS = 'Y' and mem_id=#{memId} order by CON_NO desc

select count(*) from CONSIGNMENT join member using(mem_Id) where con_del_status = 'Y'
and (con_author like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%' or con_product like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%')
and con_author like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%'
and con_product like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%'

select * from CONSIGNMENT join member using(mem_Id) where con_del_status = 'Y'
and (con_author like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%' or con_product like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%')
and con_author like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%'
and con_product like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%'
order by CON_CREATE_DATE desc

select * from attachment where ATT_STATUS = 'Y'
and att_fno = 0
and att_bno = #{conNo}
order by att_no
select * from member join consignment using(mem_Id) where con_no=#{conNo}
mapper.update: update consignment set con_author=#{conAuthor}, con_product=#{conProduct}, con_Width=#{conWidth}, con_height=#{conHeight}, con_year=#{conYear}, con_hope=#{conHope}, con_etc=#{conEtc}, con_create_date = sysdate where con_No=#{conNo}
mapper.select: select auc_start_date, auc_finish_date, auc_cno, auc_mem_id from consignment join auction on(con_no = auc_cno)
select * from consignment order by con_del_status desc, con_adm_status, con_con_status, con_no desc

select count(*) from consignment where
(con_author like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%' or con_product like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%')
con_author like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%'
con_product like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%'

select * from consignment where
(con_author like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%' or con_product like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%')
con_author like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%'
con_product like '%'|| #{keyword} ||'%'
order by con_del_status desc, con_No desc

select * from attachment where ATT_STATUS = 'Y'
and att_fno = 0
and att_bno = #{conNo}
order by att_no
mapper.update:
update consignment set con_del_status = 'N' where con_No in
#{conNo}
